Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Instead of reverting back to the old oparent which uses a certificate that will expire in 80 days, I would suggest fixing https://jenkins.onap.org/view/portal/job/portal-maven-stage-master/13/console

The issue being faced is that the team is using release versions for their development. Development should happen on SNAPSHOT artifacts. 

Development == SNAPSHOT
RC == staging workflow -> releases to a release repository

This will fix this new job.

Patch Set 1:

Hi Jessica, As I mentioned in the email, this change is causing Portal to not start. So, we would want to roll back this change and re-apply it post dublin. Or we wait until we cut of the dublin branch. Its currently a blocker.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2

I am merging as Sunder's request. Below is Jess reply in email.

-----Jess reply----
If this is a blocker. Feel free to revert my change and we can try again after the release when you guys are ready. 
 
Thanks!
Jess
-----------------
Change has been successfully merged by Manoop Talasila
